title: FB's Selyshcha
description: A datapack that brings a touch of medieval Ukrainian culture to your Minecraft worlds!
body:
## General
This datapack introduces unique, medieval Ukrainian-style villages into your Minecraft world. These villages are designed with a vanilla aesthetic to blend seamlessly with the game and generate naturally alongside default villages in the Plains biome. Whether you're interested in exploring Ukrainian culture or simply want to see something fresh and distinctive in your world - this datapack is for you!
## How to find
To locate these villages, use the command: **/locate structure selyshcha:selo**
## Note
This datapack is currently in development. You might encounter minor bugs, and new features are planned for future updates.
## Discord server
